event: View of the Arc de Triomphe in Paris
description: A muted, atmospheric painting of the Arc de Triomphe in Paris viewed from a distance down a broad avenue. The monumental arch stands at center, rendered in soft grey-brown tones that blend with the overcast sky. Trees line the approach on both sides. Street lamps and small figures dot the foreground. Buildings are visible at right. The palette is almost monochrome, dominated by greys, browns, and pale blues, creating a misty, dreamlike quality. A small clock or decorative element appears at lower right.
